quality.rationale: 题干为标准相对论理想流体模型，逻辑链条清晰，但所附解答为无关热力学推导，严重破坏完整性

origin.question: Problem 5.1. Calculate the nonzero components in an inertial frame S of the stress-energy tensor for the following systems:\n(a) A group of particles all moving with the same velocity $\underline{\beta} = \beta \underline{e}_{\mathbf{x}}$ as seen in S. Let the rest-mass density of these particles be $\rho_0$ as measured in their comoving frame. Assume a high density of particles and treat them in the continuum approximation.
origin.solution:
$$
\mathrm {T d s} = \left(\frac {\mathrm {d U}}{\mathrm {d T}} + \mathrm {k}\right) \mathrm {d T} - \frac {1}{\mathrm {n}} \mathrm {d p} \tag {6}
$$
and thus
$$
c_{p} = \frac {d U}{d T} + k = c_{v} + k. \tag {7}
$$
From Equation (1)
$$
\Gamma_{1} = \left. \frac {\partial \log p}{\partial \log n} \right|_{s} = 1 + \frac {n}{T} \frac {d T}{d n} \Bigg|_{s} \tag {8}
$$
But Equation (3) implies that, when $\mathbf{s} =$ constant,
$$
c_{v} \frac {d T}{d n} = \frac {p}{n^{2}} = k \frac {T}{n} = \left(c_{p} - c_{v}\right) \frac {T}{n}. \tag {9}
$$
Substituting Equation (9) in Equation (8) gives us
$$
\Gamma_{1} = 1 + \frac {\left(\mathrm {c}_{\mathrm {p}} - \mathrm {c}_{\mathrm {v}}\right)}{\mathrm {c}_{\mathrm {v}}} = \gamma .
$$
